code: @Manual{,   title = {{pc: Pattern Causality Analysis}},   author = {Wenbo Lyu},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1},   doi = {10.32614/CRAN.package.pc}, }

title: pc | Pattern Causality Analysis
text: logo layeyo Pattern Causality Analysis pc R package pattern-based causality analysis time series spatial cross-sectional data. uses symbolic pattern representations cross mapping detect directional interactions infer causal structure temporal dynamics spatial snapshots. Built high-performance C++ backend lightweight R interface, pc provides efficient flexible tools data-driven causality analysis. Refer package documentation https://stscl.github.io/pc/ detailed information.

title: pc | Pattern Causality Analysis
text: Install CRAN : Install binary version R-universe : Install source code GitHub :
code: install.packages("pc", dependencies = TRUE) install.packages("pc",                  repos = c("https://stscl.r-universe.dev",                            "https://cloud.r-project.org"),                  dependencies = TRUE) if (!requireNamespace("pak")) {     install.packages("pak") } pak::pak("stscl/pc", dependencies = TRUE)

title: False Nearest Neighbors — fnn
text: False Nearest Neighbors

title: False Nearest Neighbors — fnn
code: # S4 method for class 'data.frame' fnn(   data,   target,   E = 2:10,   k = 1,   tau = 1,   style = 1,   lib = NULL,   pred = NULL,   dist.metric = c("euclidean", "manhattan", "maximum"),   rt = 10,   eps = NULL,   threads = length(E),   higher.parallel = TRUE,   ... )  # S4 method for class 'sf' fnn(   data,   target,   E = 3:10,   k = 1,   tau = 1,   style = 1,   lib = NULL,   pred = NULL,   dist.metric = c("euclidean", "manhattan", "maximum"),   rt = 10,   eps = NULL,   threads = length(E),   higher.parallel = TRUE,   detrend = FALSE,   nb = NULL,   ... )  # S4 method for class 'SpatRaster' fnn(   data,   target,   E = 3:10,   k = 1,   tau = 1,   style = 1,   lib = NULL,   pred = NULL,   dist.metric = c("euclidean", "manhattan", "maximum"),   rt = 10,   eps = NULL,   threads = length(E),   higher.parallel = TRUE,   detrend = FALSE,   ... )

title: False Nearest Neighbors — fnn
text: data Observation data. target Integer column indice target variable. E (optional) Embedding dimensions. k (optional) Number nearest neighbors used evaluation. tau (optional) Step lag. style (optional) Embedding style (0 includes current state, 1 excludes ). lib (optional) Libraries indices. pred (optional) Predictions indices. dist.metric (optional) Distance measure used. rt (optional) Relative distance threshold. eps (optional) Absolute distance threshold. threads (optional) Number threads used. higher.parallel (optional) Whether use higher level parallelism. ... Additional arguments absorb unused inputs method dispatch. detrend (optional) Whether remove linear trend. nb (optional) Neighbours list.

title: False Nearest Neighbors — fnn
text: vector.

title: False Nearest Neighbors — fnn
text: Kennel, M.B., Brown, R., Abarbanel, H.D.., 1992. Determining embedding dimension phase-space reconstruction using geometrical construction. Physical Review 45, 3403–3411.

title: False Nearest Neighbors — fnn
code: crash = sf::read_sf(system.file("case/crash.gpkg", package = "pc")) pc::fnn(crash, 1, threads = 1) #> [fnn] Output 'E:i' corresponds to the i-th valid embedding dimension. #> [fnn] Input E values exceeding max embeddable dimension were truncated. #> [fnn] Please map output indices to original E inputs before interpretation. #>         E:1         E:2         E:3         E:4         E:5         E:6  #> 0.622093023 0.209302326 0.029069767 0.005813953 0.023255814 0.005813953  #>         E:7         E:8         E:9  #> 0.000000000 0.005813953 0.000000000

title: Optimal Parameter Search for Pattern Causality — ops
text: Optimal Parameter Search Pattern Causality

title: Optimal Parameter Search for Pattern Causality — ops
code: # S4 method for class 'data.frame' ops(   data,   target,   source,   E = 3:5,   k = E,   tau = 1,   style = 1,   lib = NULL,   pred = NULL,   maximize = c("dark", "positive", "negative"),   dist.metric = c("euclidean", "manhattan", "maximum"),   zero.tolerance = max(k),   relative = TRUE,   weighted = TRUE,   threads = length(E),   higher.parallel = TRUE,   h = 0,   ... )  # S4 method for class 'sf' ops(   data,   target,   source,   E = 3:5,   k = E + 1,   tau = 1,   style = 1,   lib = NULL,   pred = NULL,   maximize = c("dark", "positive", "negative"),   dist.metric = c("euclidean", "manhattan", "maximum"),   zero.tolerance = max(k),   relative = TRUE,   weighted = TRUE,   threads = length(E),   higher.parallel = TRUE,   detrend = FALSE,   nb = NULL,   ... )  # S4 method for class 'SpatRaster' ops(   data,   target,   source,   E = 3:5,   k = E + 1,   tau = 1,   style = 1,   lib = NULL,   pred = NULL,   maximize = c("positive", "negative", "dark"),   dist.metric = c("euclidean", "manhattan", "maximum"),   zero.tolerance = max(k),   relative = TRUE,   weighted = TRUE,   threads = length(E),   higher.parallel = TRUE,   detrend = FALSE,   ... )

title: Optimal Parameter Search for Pattern Causality — ops
text: data Observation data. target Integer column indice target variable. source Integer column indice source variable. E (optional) Embedding dimensions. k (optional) Number nearest neighbors used projection. tau (optional) Step lag. style (optional) Embedding style (0 includes current state, 1 excludes ). lib (optional) Libraries indices. pred (optional) Predictions indices. maximize (optional) Causality metric maximize: one "positive", "negative", "dark". dist.metric (optional) Distance measure used. zero.tolerance (optional) Maximum number zeros tolerated signature space. relative (optional) Whether calculate relative changes embedding. weighted (optional) Whether weight causal strength. threads (optional) Number threads used. higher.parallel (optional) Whether use higher level parallelism. h (optional) Prediction horizon. ... Additional arguments absorb unused inputs method dispatch. detrend (optional) Whether remove linear trend. nb (optional) Neighbours list.

title: Optimal Parameter Search for Pattern Causality — ops
text: list. param selected optimal parameter combination. xmap data.frame containing cross-mapping performance across parameter settings.

title: Optimal Parameter Search for Pattern Causality — ops
code: crash = sf::read_sf(system.file("case/crash.gpkg", package = "pc")) pc::ops(crash, 1, 2, E = 3:10, maximize = "positive", threads = 1) #> The suggested E, k, tau is 8, 8 and 1

title: Pattern Causality — pc
text: Pattern Causality

title: Pattern Causality — pc
code: # S4 method for class 'data.frame' pc(   data,   target,   source,   libsizes = NULL,   E = 3,   k = E,   tau = 1,   style = 1,   lib = NULL,   pred = NULL,   boot = 99,   replace = FALSE,   seed = 42L,   dist.metric = c("euclidean", "manhattan", "maximum"),   zero.tolerance = max(k),   relative = TRUE,   weighted = TRUE,   threads = length(libsizes),   higher.parallel = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE,   h = 0,   ... )  # S4 method for class 'sf' pc(   data,   target,   source,   libsizes = NULL,   E = 3,   k = E + 1,   tau = 1,   style = 1,   lib = NULL,   pred = NULL,   boot = 99,   replace = FALSE,   seed = 42L,   dist.metric = c("euclidean", "manhattan", "maximum"),   zero.tolerance = max(k),   relative = TRUE,   weighted = TRUE,   threads = length(libsizes),   higher.parallel = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE,   detrend = FALSE,   nb = NULL,   ... )  # S4 method for class 'SpatRaster' pc(   data,   target,   source,   libsizes = NULL,   E = 3,   k = E + 1,   tau = 1,   style = 1,   lib = NULL,   pred = NULL,   boot = 99,   replace = FALSE,   seed = 42L,   dist.metric = c("euclidean", "manhattan", "maximum"),   zero.tolerance = max(k),   relative = TRUE,   weighted = TRUE,   threads = length(libsizes),   higher.parallel = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE,   detrend = FALSE,   ... )

title: Pattern Causality — pc
text: data Observation data. target Integer column indice target variable. source Integer column indice source variable. libsizes (optional) Number observations used. E (optional) Embedding dimensions. k (optional) Number nearest neighbors used projection. tau (optional) Step lag. style (optional) Embedding style (0 includes current state, 1 excludes ). lib (optional) Libraries indices. pred (optional) Predictions indices. boot (optional) Number bootstraps perform. replace (optional) sampling replacement? seed (optional) Random seed. dist.metric (optional) Distance measure used. zero.tolerance (optional) Maximum number zeros tolerated signature space. relative (optional) Whether calculate relative changes embedding. weighted (optional) Whether weight causal strength. threads (optional) Number threads used. higher.parallel (optional) Whether use higher level parallelism. verbose (optional) Whether show progress bar. h (optional) Prediction horizon. ... Additional arguments absorb unused inputs method dispatch. detrend (optional) Whether remove linear trend. nb (optional) Neighbours list.

title: Pattern Causality — pc
text: list. causality data.frame causality results. libsizes NULL, contains per-sample causality estimates; otherwise, contains causality results evaluated across different library sizes. summary data.frame summarizing overall causality metrics. returned libsizes NULL.

title: Pattern Causality — pc
text: Stavroglou, S.K., Pantelous, .., Stanley, H.E., Zuev, K.M., 2020. Unveiling causal interactions complex systems. Proceedings National Academy Sciences 117, 7599–7605.

title: pc 0.2
text: Document maintain built-case datasets reproducible analysis (#61). Extend pc generic visualization capabilities (#55). Provide fnn generic false nearest neighbors method (#49). Support linear trend removal spatial cross-sectional data (#36).

title: pc 0.2
text: Support sampling without replacement bootstrapped version pattern causality (#58). Enable method dispatch compatibility pc ops generics via ... (#43). Improve handling large-scale inputs (#33).

title: pc 0.2
text: Fix unintended CCM-style xmap behavior pattern causality estimation (#52).

title: pc 0.1
text: CRAN release: 2026-03-30 First stable release (#24).
